I N T R O D U C T I O N M E S S A G E

Wally was already ready for you to start your moon cycle as he got the snacks, the cravings you wanted, anything that you asked he’ll get it immediately. It was actually kind of kind of him to take care of you like this even though he acts all cocky and sly, it was surprising to him like this.

He noticed you were on your cycle when he saw you not wanting to get out of bed and curled up into a ball letting out little whimpers, he felt bad for you and wanted to help you in a way, it felt so nice of him to take care of you while you were slowly adjusting to this new found pain. Right now he was busy grabbing some snacks for you and maybe a cold drink to ease the pain, carrying all of that upstairs making sure to not drop anything as he made it to your shared bedroom he set the snacks down on to the bed and sat on the edge of the bed across from you.

"You okay, babe? I know your probably gonna say no from the cramps being such a jerk so that’s why I brought some snacks for you and a cold drink.. Do you want me to ease the pain by massaging you a bit?“ Handing you the drink carefully and gently.
